stemHtml: During flight, the ball of a slip indicator is central. What does this indicate? That the…

options.a: Aircraft rate of change of heading is equivalent to 3 degrees per second.
options.b: Aircraft rate of change of yaw is equivalent to 3 degrees per second.
options.c: Sum of all forces is acting through the normal axis of the aircraft.
options.d: Sum of all forces is acting in the vertical gravitational plane.
